name: Gray Forrester
ticker: GRAY FORRESTER - PORTFOLIO OF IDEAS, PROJECTS & OTHER ODDS AND ENDS - EST. 2026

home.heroLede: Agents that learn, controllers that settle, small tools for large rabbit holes. Built at work, at school, and after hours with Claude Code.

body: By day I’m a product owner and forward-deployed engineer at Deloitte — ConvergeHealth, the arm that ships software into healthcare revenue cycle. I’m helping build an agentic platform there: AI agents doing real work in a domain where “mostly right” is not a feature. The job is half product judgment, half deployment plumbing — I like both halves.
work.micro: AGENTIC PLATFORM · HEALTHCARE REVENUE CYCLE · HUMANS IN THE LOOP

school.lede: Coursework that got out of hand — the theory underneath the agents: reward signals, control loops, state and search. Write-ups are public; source stays behind the honor code, shared in limited ways on request.

play.lede: After-hours SaaS apps, built end-to-end with Claude Code and live in production.

home.blogNote: The blog opens when there’s something worth reading. Soon-ish.

contact.heroLede: One inbox, checked often. Recruiters, collaborators, and people with strong opinions about CD shelving all welcome.
